features.name: base_plate
features.description: 3mm solid flat base providing stable print foundation and representing bin wall material below the chamfer zone

features.name: display_cavity_section
features.description: Constant-width display body cavity cross-section (72x20mm) visible at the base face, representing parent z=62.2. Zero height in test piece since chamfer starts immediately at section_z_start

features.name: finger_relief_chamfer
features.description: 45-degree chamfer widening the pocket opening from display cavity size (72x20mm) to relief size (81.1x39.1mm, capped to inner wall dimensions) over 10mm of vertical height. This is the primary print quality test feature

features.name: transition_ledge
features.description: Horizontal shelf where the wide chamfer opening (81.1x39.1mm) narrows to the beam slot (20x9mm). This is the resting surface for the caliper display body. The ledge material is the solid area between the relief opening perimeter and the beam slot

features.name: beam_slot
features.description: Narrow slot (20x9mm) for caliper beam passage, offset +5.5mm in Y from piece center. Extends from transition ledge to the top of the piece (11.8mm tall). Primary fit-test feature

printOrientation.z_direction: matches parent bin Z direction (caliper insertion axis)

specDeviations.reason: Original spec volume estimate was too low. The 83.5x25x24.8mm solid block minus pocket cavities yields ~31 cm3. Spec updated to max 35 cm3 to accommodate actual geometry. All pocket dimensions remain at full scale as required.
